{{Quote|Artoo? What happened? I can't see!|Luke Skywalker, taken the effects of a flash grenade|<ref name="SWSS 5">[[Star Wars (2015) 5|''Star Wars'' (2015) 5]]</ref>}}
A '''flash grenade''', also known as a '''flash bomb''' was a type of non-[[Death|lethal]] [[grenade]] which, when activated, created a bright energy flash and loud noise to disorient opponents.<ref name="Battlefront" /> It also gave a mild impact although it was not as destructive as [[thermal detonator]]s, and was capable of disabling [[droid]]s for a short period of time.<ref name="SWSS 5" /> One variant of the grenade could split into several fragments and individually explode.<ref name="Battlefront 2">''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]''</ref>

In [[14 BBY]],<ref name="Fallen Order Date">''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order]]'' to [[14 BBY]].</ref> the [[Jedi Knight]] [[Cal Kestis]] infiltrated the [[Fortress Inquisitorius]] on [[Nur]] in an attempt to retrieve a [[Eno Cordova's holocron|holocron]] that contained a list of [[Force-sensitive]] children. During the [[Mission to Nur|mission]], Kestis was confronted by the [[Inquisitor]] known as the [[Second Sister]] who attempted to use flash grenades to disorientate her opponent during their [[Lightsaber combat|duel]].<ref name="Fallen Order">''[[Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order]]''</ref>

When [[Luke Skywalker]] went on a [[Duel in Ben Kenobi's home|mission]] to [[Ben Kenobi's home]] with [[R2-D2]], [[Boba Fett]] ambushed them with a flash grenade in an attempt to capture the boy.<ref name="SWSS 5" />

{{Weapon-stub}}
